failures.detail: Recipe JSON schema field names (pedalChain/effectsLoopChain/amps with gearId/role/side; substitutionAudit[].method) are documented NOWHERE in CLAUDE.md or tone-engineer.md — they live only inside the shipped validateRecipeRoles(). A recipe authored with a plausible-but-wrong key (e.g. 'roleAssertion' instead of 'role') passes validation with exit 0 (verified: probe with {gearId,roleAssertion} returned VALID; same probe with correct {gearId,role:'phase-shift'} correctly returned INVALID exit 1). Silent-pass on a mistyped field is the swallow-the-error class. Severity: latent. Fix: document the exact recipe schema in tone-engineer.md §Recipe Mode and/or have validateRecipeRoles flag unrecognized entry keys.

No committed .claude/settings.json baseline exists — only settings.local.json. settings.local.json has NO deny list, so the framework-required destructive-ops deny-list (§III.2 permission baseline) is absent. This is a P13 permission-baseline gap.

stale_claims: settings.local.json line 19 references stale absolute path 'C:\Users\miken\OneDrive\Desktop\claude stuff\TONE RI\SRV - Little Wing.pdf' — pre-move location; dead permission entry (Pattern B vestige).
settings.local.json line 37 PowerShell allow-entry references the collapsed 'Tone (RI)\' subdir (removed per LD#7 2026-05-17) — dead permission entry.

summary: Scaffolding is largely trustworthy. ALL executable probes ran live and passed: headless-Edge self-test 29/29 green, validate-recipe-roles --index/--roles exit 0, §3.7 reverse guard fires correctly (bad role + unknown gearId -> exit 1, good -> exit 0). ALL counts/anchors/line-numbers verified accurate (zero drift in version strings, gear/role/agent/command counts, banner anchors, named functions, mission-phrase line). 2 FAILs: (1) recipe JSON schema field names undocumented -> silent-pass on mistyped key (latent error-swallow class); (2) no committed settings.json baseline + no deny-list (P13 gap). 5 of 8 agents never dispatched as agents (hendrix/evh/srv/kws/guitar-systems) across 4 transcripts — authored != working, though small sample. 2 stale permission entries reference pre-move paths. NOT every probe was mutating-skipped; no probe skipped for a non-mutating reason.
